steps.title: Identify the escalating control
steps.content: Those who “demanded” the proliferation of his work now “determine” it. This escalation from demanding to determining shows these people are TAKING CONTROL of the art. The target meaning must capture CONTROLLING or DICTATING what the work becomes.

steps.title: Match the word meaning
steps.content: “Dictate” means to control or impose authoritatively—what exhibitors and purchasers would do after demanding an artist's output. The other choices describe judgment or selection, not the imposition of will shown here. That matches choice B — B is correct.
